g4_revenue_trend.description: COVID cyclical decline — not structural. Core demand intact.

g7_moat.description: Moat is the balance sheet, not the product. CVX entered COVID with lowest debt/capital ratio in major oil (22.7%). 33 consecutive years of dividend increases including loss years. Can outlast competitors in downturns and acquire assets cheaply.

buffett_action: Bought $4.1B in Q4 2020, added to $19.8B by 2022
actual_result: Large win — oil recovery + dividend income
key_insight: For cyclical businesses, normalize ROE/FCF over the cycle. The key differentiator between CVX and XOM was balance sheet discipline — same industry, vastly different financial quality.
